title: gentianella muelleriana subsp. alpestris
intro: Gentianella muelleriana subsp. alpestris, also known as Alpine Gentianella, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the gentian family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and dyspepsia. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Gentianella muelleriana subsp. alpestris can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and alleviate digestive disorders.
